items.title: Hongaarse bondscoach onthult dé droomclub van Szoboszlai
items.summary: De Hongaarse bondscoach Marco Rossi heeft de droomclub van Dominik Szoboszlai uit de doeken gedaan. De Hongaarse middenvelder blinkt de afgelopen weken uit bij Liverpool. Ooit hoopt hij dat ook in het shirt van Real Madrid te doen.

items.title: VI Live: Feyenoord - Go Ahead onder toeziend oog van Sterling begonnen
items.summary: Feyenoord krijgt zondagmiddag bezoek van Go Ahead Eagles. De Rotterdammers kwamen in rustiger vaarwater na de zege op FC Utrecht. Go Ahead wacht al zeventien duels op een zege. Volg de Eredivisie-pot in deze VI Live. Voor al het andere voetbal op de (inter)nationale velden hebben we een aparte VI Live .

items.title: Rangers v Hearts buildup, Clough pulls off FA Cup shock and more – matchday live
items.summary: ⚽ Reaction to Saturday’s news and Sunday action buildup ⚽ Today’s games | Follow us on Bluesky | And mail John Leeds are fresh off their 2-2 draw against Chelsea. Meanwhile, Birmingham are eight games unbeaten in all competitions. What’s your prediction for today’s game? If it’s anything like Leeds’ 5-4 victory over Birmingham in 2019, we’re in for a treat. Aston Villa v Tottenham Hotspur Chelsea v Liverpool Everton v West Ham United Manchester United v London City Lionesses Brighton & Hove Albion v Arsenal (2:30pm) Continue reading...

items.title: Lens mag dromen van Franse titel: 'Een kampioen waardig'
items.summary: Op 65 procent van de competitie mag RC Lens nog altijd hopen op het kampioenschap. Les Sang et Or nam dit weekend de koppositie over van Paris Saint-Germain. 'In seizoenen als dit heb je het gevoel dat alles meezit.'

items.title: Birmingham City v Leeds United: FA Cup fourth round – live
items.summary: ⚽ FA Cup news from the 12pm GMT kick-off at St Andrew’s ⚽ Live scoreboard | Follow us on Bluesky | And mail Emillia Hello and welcome to coverage of the FA Cup fourth-round match between Birmingham City and Leeds United. It’s 10th in the Championship versus 15th in the Premier League today as Birmingham target an upset. The hosts last made it to the fifth round in the 2019-20 season, where they lost to Leicester City after beating Coventry City on penalties. Meanwhile, Leeds made it to the next stage of the competition just two years ago by defeating Plymouth Argyle in a replay. They then went on to lose out to Chelsea. Continue reading...

items.title: Chelsea v Liverpool, Aston Villa v Tottenham, and more: Women’s Super League – live
items.summary: ⚽ Follow WSL updates from the four 12pm GMT kick-offs ⚽ Live scoreboard | Follow us on Bluesky | Email Xaymaca Hello and welcome to live coverage of the Women’s Super League. We’ve got four lunchtime kick-offs (12pm GMT) to look forward to, including Chelsea v Liverpool and Manchester United v London City Lionesses. The title race is effectively over for Chelsea, after humiliating back to back defeats against Arsenal and Manchester City. They bounced back with a win against Spurs last week so Sonia Bompastor will be hoping for an end of season rally to keep them in the Champions League places. Continue reading...

items.title: Van den Herik: 'Ik zou Van Persie nooit hebben aangesteld'
items.summary: Jorien van den Herik, jarenlang als bijvoorbeeld voorzitter verbonden aan Feyenoord, heeft zijn ongezouten mening gegeven over de huidige situatie in Rotterdam-Zuid. Hij zou Robin van Persie nooit hebben aangesteld als trainer en vindt dat de clubleiding zijn conclusie moet trekken als Feyenoord het seizoen niet op een positieve manier afsluit.

items.title: Hulk (39) flikt het weer en jaagt van grote afstand vrije trap in de kruising
items.summary: Hulk is en blijft een fenomeen. Ook op 39-jarige leeftijd. Met de specialiteit van het huis sloeg hij van grote afstand toe voor Clube Atlético Mineiro op bezoek bij Itabirito. En passant completeerde hij later ook nog zijn hattrick.

items.title: West Indies reach Super 8s with commanding Nepal win in England's group
items.summary: West Indies are through to the Super 8s of the T20 World Cup after maintaining their perfect record so far by beating Nepal by nine wickets in Mumbai.

items.title: FA Cup winners' medal, Odegaard's armband and Pictionary with Arteta
items.summary: As his team prepare to face his old club Arsenal, Wigan midfielder Matt Smith tells BBC Sport about his FA Cup final winners' medal and the advice Mikel Arteta gave him before he left.

items.title: ‘Ferryman’ Igor Tudor has the record to steer Tottenham to safety
items.summary: Croat never stays long but is an expert at doing what is necessary and also comes with a reputation as a taskmaster In Italy, the interim manager of a football club is often referred to as “un traghettatore” – a ferryman. When waters are choppy, you do not need some ambitious captain with notions of heading out on an adventure. All you really want is someone who can get you safely to shore. Igor Tudor is not keen on the word. Hearing it applied to him when he arrived at Juventus last season, he observed that every manager, everywhere, is living from game to game. “You can have a contract for five years and get sent home after three matches,” he said. “You have to construct your tomorrow today.” Continue reading...

items.title: Eden Hazard: ‘I’m more of a taxi driver than a football player now, but it’s OK’
items.summary: Former Chelsea and Real Madrid idol wants merely to be remembered as ‘a good player and a funny guy’ after a career of multiple titles – and spats with Mourinho If Italy is a boot, Lecce sits right on the heel. It is here, deep in the countryside a few kilometres outside the baroque city, that the noise of the Bernabéu and the intensity of Stamford Bridge feel like a lifetime ago. The setting is rustic, quiet and slow-paced: a stark contrast to the frenetic energy that defined Eden Hazard’s career on the pitch. It has been almost three years since he stopped playing, and the silence since his retirement at 32 has been notable. After an injury-hit spell at Real Madrid brought a premature end to a dazzling career, Hazard did not seek the spotlight. Surrounded by vineyards rather than defenders, slumped in an armchair, he seems entirely at peace, remarkably comfortable with his life after football. Continue reading...

items.title: 'Best moment of my life!' - Kim wins title to cap golf comeback after 12-year absence
items.summary: Anthony Kim won LIV Golf Adelaide on Sunday for his first victory in nearly 16 years, capping a remarkable career comeback with a closing 9-under 63 for a three-shot margin.

items.title: Is Zubimendi Arsenal's best player?
items.summary: After an impressive start to his Arsenal career, BBC Sport looks at whether Martin Zubimendi is the Gunners' most important player.

items.title: Three years on, Deulofeu is still fighting for 'miracle' return
items.summary: Gerard Deulofeu has not played for more than three years but believes he can make "history" by fighting for a "miracle" comeback.

items.title: Silky Lass takes on Lakota Chief at Newcastle
items.summary: It's all about Newcastle today, with Silky Lass and Lakota Chief headlining the feature race at 4.42pm.

items.title: Real Madrid 'lucky to have' Trent, says Arbeloa
items.summary: Alvaro Arbeloa praised Trent Alexander-Arnold, saying Real Madrid are "lucky to have" him after the full-back starred, providing an assist, in Real Madrid's 4-1 win over Real Sociedad.

items.title: Juve furious at 'unacceptable' ref call in Inter loss
items.summary: Juventus officials expressed their fury and what they called an "unacceptable" and "embarrassing" decision to send off defender Pierre Kalulu in Saturday's dramatic loss to rivals Inter Milan.

items.title: Salah: In-form Szoboszlai among the world's best
items.summary: Mohamed Salah has described teammate Dominik Szoboszlai as "one of the best players in the world" after the Hungary international scored for Liverpool in their 3-0 victory over Brighton & Hove Albion on Saturday.

items.title: Ronaldo ends protest, scores 18 minutes later
items.summary: Cristiano Ronaldo returned to Al Nassr's lineup for Saturday's match at Al Fateh -- and swiftly scored.
